---
title: "About"
---

This is my attempt at trying to teach myself analysis (again).
I just did not have the aptitude, fortitude, and the minutes as an undergraduate to fully understand analysis.

As I quit my graduate program, I still wondered - do I know *any* analysis?

> For I was consciscious that I knew practically nothing...
> 
> <cite>- Socrates</cite>

I sincerely hope that this collection of my mathematical ramblings provide some insight towards the problems you are trying to solve - life or mathematical.
